generated_oml:
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.com/DTDFVocab"

instance SystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CraneFrame, CartStepperMotor, HoistStepperMotor, Electromagnet, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoMicrocontroller, PSU, CartMotorController, HoistMotorController, HostMachine
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp",
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment SystemEnvironment
]

instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Crane frame of the lab-scale gantry crane inspired by harbor cranes in Antwerp"
]

instance CartStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for cart movement in the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance HoistStepperMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor for hoist movement in the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container handling in the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring swing angle of the hoist in the lab-scale gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring wind speed for the lab-scale gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:producedData AnemometerDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller interfacing sensors and actuators for the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance PSU : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance CartMotorController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for cart stepper motor"
]

instance HoistMotorController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor controller for hoist stepper motor"
]

instance HostMachine : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Single host machine on which the digital twin system is deployed"
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for generating optimal trajectories using kinematic model for the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectory
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating trajectory execution of the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResult
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation by comparing real-time measurements against simulations",
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationAlert
]

instance DatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging historical data to TimescaleDB",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAccess
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for data visualization using Grafana",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualization
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for MQTT broker communication (Eclipse Mosquitto)",
    DTDFVocab:provides MessageQueuingService
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of the lab-scale gantry crane created in Autodesk Fusion360",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModule
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory planning of the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModule
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model for trajectory execution of the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonGantrylibModule
]

instance DarTwinModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DarTwin notation for tracking evolution of the digital twin"
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance AnemometerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle data from the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, PythonGantrylibModule, Grafana
]

instance AnemometerData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed data from the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AnemometerDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, PythonGantrylibModule, Grafana
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization tool for the digital twin system"
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL-based) for time-series data storage",
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for data visualization",
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance EclipseMosquittoMQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for message queuing",
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance PythonGantrylibModule : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for gantry crane control and simulation",
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance AutodeskFusion360CAD : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD modeling"
]

instance Capella : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Capella for Model-Based Systems Engineering"
]

instance ContinuousValidationAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert generated by continuous validation service when faults are detected"
]

instance OptimalTrajectory : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory for crane control generated by trajectory generation service",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RealTimeVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of system state with simulation confidence bounds"
]

instance HistoricalDataAccess : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data storage service for querying"
]

instance SimulationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results used for validation and visualization"
]

instance MessageQueuingService : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Message queuing service for communication between components"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., optimal trajectories from Trajectory Generator Service) sent via the Control Application and Physical Crane Interface to actuate motors and electromagnet."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization for validation and control operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized architecture with Docker containers for database, dashboard, MQTT broker; Python-based services (control, logging, trajectory generation, simulation, validation); all deployed on a single PC."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Primarily covers the 'as operated' phase, with CAD models used for design representation but main services focused on operational monitoring and control."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between real-time measurements and simulations; breaches of threshold trigger alerts via dashboard."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication; Python interface for physical crane control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Single PC deployment using Docker Compose for database, dashboard, and MQTT broker; gantrylib Python module for other services."
]
